CustomObject.description:
This Custom meta data is part of JIRA story 3146 "https://stwater-cms.atlassian.net/browse/WWTC-3146?visitedUserSeg=true" ZThis is currently used in flow named "FSM Proformas & Customer Comms - V8 "
Flow Label FSM Proformas & Customer Comms Flow API Name FSM_ProformaCustomerComms . Business required a new proforma and the 2 new existing proforma to run for "Metering Business Unit.
CustomObject.label: FSM Metering BU Service Territory
